### Code Quality

### Documentation

### Testing

- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the changes in different environments (if applicable)

### Dependencies

- [ ] I have updated requirements.txt/pyproject.toml if new dependencies were added
- [ ] I have verified that new dependencies are compatible with existing ones

### Security & Performance

- [ ] I have considered the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] I have not introduced any potential security vulnerabilities
